verses.latin_vulgate: Benedicam Dominum in omni tempore ;  semper laus ejus in ore meo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲבָרְכָ֣ה אֶת־יְהֹוָ֣ה בְּכׇל־עֵ֑ת תָּ֝מִ֗יד תְּֽהִלָּת֥וֹ בְּפִֽי׃
verses.king_james: I will bless the Lord at all times: his praise shall continually be in my mouth.

verses.latin_vulgate: In Domino laudabitur anima mea :  audiant mansueti, et lætentur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּ֭יהֹוָה תִּתְהַלֵּ֣ל נַפְשִׁ֑י יִשְׁמְע֖וּ עֲנָוִ֣ים וְיִשְׂמָֽחוּ׃
verses.king_james: My soul shall make her boast in the Lord: the humble shall hear thereof, and be glad.

verses.latin_vulgate: Magnificate Dominum mecum,  et exaltemus nomen ejus in idipsum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּדְּל֣וּ לַיהֹוָ֣ה אִתִּ֑י וּנְרוֹמְמָ֖ה שְׁמ֣וֹ יַחְדָּֽו׃
verses.king_james: O magnify the Lord with me, and let us exalt his name together.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exquisivi Dominum, et exaudivit me ;  et ex omnibus tribulationibus meis eripuit me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דָּרַ֣שְׁתִּי אֶת־יְהֹוָ֣ה וְעָנָ֑נִי וּמִכׇּל־מְ֝גוּרוֹתַ֗י הִצִּילָֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: I sought the Lord, and he heard me, and delivered me from all my fears.

verses.latin_vulgate: Accedite ad eum, et illuminamini ;  et facies vestræ non confundentur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִבִּ֣יטוּ אֵלָ֣יו וְנָהָ֑רוּ וּ֝פְנֵיהֶ֗ם אַל־יֶחְפָּֽרוּ׃
verses.king_james: They looked unto him, and were lightened: and their faces were not ashamed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Iste pauper clamavit, et Dominus exaudivit eum,  et de omnibus tribulationibus ejus salvavit eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֶ֤ה עָנִ֣י קָ֭רָא וַיהֹוָ֣ה שָׁמֵ֑עַ וּמִכׇּל־צָ֝רוֹתָ֗יו הוֹשִׁיעֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: This poor man cried, and the Lord heard him, and saved him out of all his troubles.

verses.latin_vulgate: Immittet angelus Domini in circuitu timentium eum,  et eripiet eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֹנֶ֤ה מַלְאַךְ־יְהֹוָ֓ה סָ֘בִ֤יב לִירֵאָ֗יו וַֽיְחַלְּצֵֽם׃
verses.king_james: The angel of the Lord encampeth round about them that fear him, and delivereth them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Gustate et videte quoniam suavis est Dominus ;  beatus vir qui sperat in eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: טַעֲמ֣וּ וּ֭רְאוּ כִּֽי־ט֣וֹב יְהֹוָ֑ה אַֽשְׁרֵ֥י הַ֝גֶּ֗בֶר יֶחֱסֶה־בּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: O taste and see that the Lord is good: blessed is the man that trusteth in him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Timete Dominum, omnes sancti ejus,  quoniam non est inopia timentibus eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְר֣אוּ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֣ה קְדֹשָׁ֑יו כִּי־אֵ֥ין מַ֝חְס֗וֹר לִירֵאָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: O fear the Lord, ye his saints: for there is no want to them that fear him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Divites eguerunt, et esurierunt ;  inquirentes autem Dominum non minuentur omni bono.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּ֭פִירִים רָשׁ֣וּ וְרָעֵ֑בוּ וְדֹרְשֵׁ֥י יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה לֹא־יַחְסְר֥וּ כׇל־טֽוֹב׃
verses.king_james: The young lions do lack, and suffer hunger: but they that seek the Lord shall not want any good thing.

verses.latin_vulgate: Venite, filii ; audite me :  timorem Domini docebo vos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְֽכוּ־בָ֭נִים שִׁמְעוּ־לִ֑י יִֽרְאַ֥ת יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה אֲלַמֶּדְכֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: Come, ye children, hearken unto me: I will teach you the fear of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis est homo qui vult vitam ;  diligit dies videre bonos ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִֽי־הָ֭אִישׁ הֶחָפֵ֣ץ חַיִּ֑ים אֹהֵ֥ב יָ֝מִ֗ים לִרְא֥וֹת טֽוֹב׃
verses.king_james: What man is he that desireth life, and loveth many days, that he may see good?

verses.latin_vulgate: Prohibe linguam tuam a malo,  et labia tua ne loquantur dolum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נְצֹ֣ר לְשׁוֹנְךָ֣ מֵרָ֑ע וּ֝שְׂפָתֶ֗יךָ מִדַּבֵּ֥ר מִרְמָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Keep thy tongue from evil, and thy lips from speaking guile.

verses.latin_vulgate: Diverte a malo, et fac bonum ;  inquire pacem, et persequere eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ס֣וּר מֵ֭רָע וַעֲשֵׂה־ט֑וֹב בַּקֵּ֖שׁ שָׁל֣וֹם וְרׇדְפֵֽהוּ׃
verses.king_james: Depart from evil, and do good; seek peace, and pursue it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Oculi Domini super justos,  et aures ejus in preces eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֵינֵ֣י יְ֭הֹוָה אֶל־צַדִּיקִ֑ים וְ֝אׇזְנָ֗יו אֶל־שַׁוְעָתָֽם׃
verses.king_james: The eyes of the Lord are upon the righteous, and his ears are open unto their cry.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vultus autem Domini super facientes mala,  ut perdat de terra memoriam eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פְּנֵ֣י יְ֭הֹוָה בְּעֹ֣שֵׂי רָ֑ע לְהַכְרִ֖ית מֵאֶ֣רֶץ זִכְרָֽם׃
verses.king_james: The face of the Lord is against them that do evil, to cut off the remembrance of them from the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Clamaverunt justi, et Dominus exaudivit eos ;  et ex omnibus tribulationibus eorum liberavit eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צָ֭עֲקוּ וַיהֹוָ֣ה שָׁמֵ֑עַ וּמִכׇּל־צָ֝רוֹתָ֗ם הִצִּילָֽם׃
verses.king_james: The righteous cry, and the Lord heareth, and delivereth them out of all their troubles.

verses.latin_vulgate: Juxta est Dominus iis qui tribulato sunt corde,  et humiles spiritu salvabit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קָר֣וֹב יְ֭הֹוָה לְנִשְׁבְּרֵי־לֵ֑ב וְֽאֶת־דַּכְּאֵי־ר֥וּחַ יוֹשִֽׁיעַ׃
verses.king_james: The Lord is nigh unto them that are of a broken heart; and saveth such as be of a contrite spirit.

verses.latin_vulgate: Multæ tribulationes justorum ;  et de omnibus his liberabit eos Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַ֭בּוֹת רָע֣וֹת צַדִּ֑יק וּ֝מִכֻּלָּ֗ם יַצִּילֶ֥נּוּ יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Many are the afflictions of the righteous: but the Lord delivereth him out of them all.

verses.latin_vulgate: Custodit Dominus omnia ossa eorum :  unum ex his non conteretur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שֹׁמֵ֥ר כׇּל־עַצְמוֹתָ֑יו אַחַ֥ת מֵ֝הֵ֗נָּה לֹ֣א נִשְׁבָּֽרָה׃
verses.king_james: He keepeth all his bones: not one of them is broken.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mors peccatorum pessima ;  et qui oderunt justum delinquent.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תְּמוֹתֵ֣ת רָשָׁ֣ע רָעָ֑ה וְשֹׂנְאֵ֖י צַדִּ֣יק יֶאְשָֽׁמוּ׃
verses.king_james: Evil shall slay the wicked: and they that hate the righteous shall be desolate.

verses.latin_vulgate: Redimet Dominus animas servorum suorum,  et non delinquent omnes qui sperant in eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פֹּדֶ֣ה יְ֭הֹוָה נֶ֣פֶשׁ עֲבָדָ֑יו וְלֹ֥א יֶ֝אְשְׁמ֗וּ כׇּֽל־הַחֹסִ֥ים בּֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: The Lord redeemeth the soul of his servants: and none of them that trust in him shall be desolate.
